channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: National Assembly Passes Finance Bill Following Electronic Vote
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: The National Assembly has officially passed the Finance Bill after a formal electronic vote. The controversial legislation now heads to the President.
item.content:encoded: The National Assembly has officially passed the Finance Bill after a formal electronic vote. The controversial legislation now heads to the President.
